title: justicia neoglandulosa
intro: Justicia neoglandulosa, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle or Justicia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Justicia neoglandulosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including capsules and ointments.
